away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Iliana Rupert
players.injury_comment: Rupert signed a multi-year contract with Golden State during the offseason and missed the start of training camp due to an overseas commitment. Her status for the 2026 regular season now appears to be in jeopardy due to her pregnancy. The 24-year-old made 21 regular-season appearances (11 starts) for the Valkyries last year and averaged 9.3 points, 3.9 rebounds and 1.6 assists in 23.1 minutes per game. If Rupert is sidelined in 2026, Janelle Salaun, Kiah Stokes and Laeticia Amihere are candidates to see increased work.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Jewell Loyd
players.injury_comment: Loyd has been sidelined for the Aces' last two games due to a left leg injury, but the improved game status indicates that she will return for Saturday's matinee. If Loyd is cleared to play, then there would be less minutes available for Kierstan Bell and Brianna Turner. Loyd is averaging 7.3 points, 2.6 rebounds, 1.6 assists and 1.6 threes over 27.3 minutes per game this season.

players.name: Chennedy Carter
players.injury_comment: Carter has played well this season, though she will miss her second consecutive game Saturday due to a leg injury. With Jewell Loyd (leg) questionable, Kierstan Bell and Brianna Turner may need to remain more involved than usual.

players.name: Dana Evans
players.injury_comment: Evans, who has yet to play this season, will miss another game. She should be considered doubtful for Monday's game against the Storm.
